title: ACB Electrical Reading
description: A single quantitative electrical reading from the electrical-test step of an ACB test (e.g. insulation resistance, contact resistance, trip time). Stored in eq-solves-service inside the shared acb_test_readings table — EQ Intake canonicalises this as a distinct child entity because readings carry value + unit + optional pass band, whereas visual checks are bare pass/fail.

label.description: What is being measured (e.g. 'Insulation Resistance L1-N', 'Contact Resistance Pole 1', 'Trip Time at 5x In').

value.description: Recorded reading as text. Kept as text to preserve significant digits and notations like '>2000', '0.45' as the technician entered them.

is_pass.description: Pass/fail evaluation against expected range (set at report-render time, not at storage). Null if no pass criteria configured.

x-eq-import-hints.description: Electrical readings appear as a block of labelled value+unit cells on the test sheet. Numeric coercion happens at report-render time, not at storage — preserve technician's exact entry.

common_sources.name: ACB test sheet — Electrical Readings block
watchouts: Unit may be in the same cell as value ('1500 MΩ') — split on import
